requirement_topic.en: EEAA Refrigerant / ODS Controls — Egypt HCFC Phasedown under Montreal Protocol
requirement_topic.zh: EEAA制冷剂/ODS管制——《蒙特利尔议定书》下埃及HCFC削减计划
requirement_topic.zht: EEAA製冷劑/ODS管制——《蒙特利爾議定書》下埃及HCFC削減計劃

summary.en: Egypt's Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency (EEAA) manages the phase-down of ozone-depleting substances (ODS) including HCFCs (e.g. R-22) under Egypt's obligations as a party to the Montreal Protocol. Import of equipment pre-charged with R-22 or containing HCFC refrigerants is subject to EEAA ODS import controls and may require an ODS import permit. Egypt is in active HCFC phasedown; R-22 equipment faces increasing import restrictions. Low-GWP alternatives including R-410A and R-32 are accepted and preferred by Egyptian importers. Exporters should confirm that the refrigerant type and ODS import status comply with the current EEAA phasedown schedule before shipment.
summary.zh: 埃及环境事务局（EEAA）依据埃及作为《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方的义务，管理包括HCFC（如R-22）在内的消耗臭氧层物质（ODS）的削减工作。进口预充R-22或含HCFC制冷剂设备须遵守EEAA ODS进口管制，可能需要ODS进口许可证。埃及正处于HCFC积极削减阶段；R-22设备面临日益严格的进口限制。包括R-410A和R-32在内的低GWP替代品被接受，且受到埃及进口商的青睐。出口商应在发货前确认制冷剂类型和ODS进口状态符合EEAA现行削减计划。
summary.zht: 埃及環境事務局（EEAA）依據埃及作為《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方的義務，管理包括HCFC（如R-22）在內的消耗臭氧層物質（ODS）的削減工作。進口預充R-22或含HCFC製冷劑設備須遵守EEAA ODS進口管制，可能需要ODS進口許可證。埃及正處於HCFC積極削減階段；R-22設備面臨日益嚴格的進口限制。包括R-410A和R-32在內的低GWP替代品被接受，且受到埃及進口商的青睞。出口商應在發貨前確認製冷劑類型和ODS進口狀態符合EEAA現行削減計劃。

standards_or_laws: Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency (EEAA) ODS import control regulations
Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer — Egypt HCFC phasedown schedule
Egypt Law No. 4 of 1994 (Environment Law) and subsequent amendments — EEAA mandate
EEAA ODS import permit requirement for HCFC-charged equipment

summary.en: China is also a Montreal Protocol party and manages its own HCFC phasedown under the China HCFC Phase-out Management Plan (HPMP). GB 9237 sets refrigerant safety requirements for refrigerating systems. Chinese heat pump manufacturers have largely transitioned to R-410A and R-32. China's domestic ODS controls are managed by MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) and are a separate domestic regime; Chinese ODS documentation does not substitute EEAA ODS permit requirements.
summary.zh: 中国同样是《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方，依据中国HCFC淘汰管理计划（HPMP）管理本国HCFC削减工作。GB 9237规定了制冷系统的制冷剂安全要求。中国热泵制造商已基本完成向R-410A和R-32的过渡。中国国内ODS管制由生态环境部（MEE）主管，属于独立的国内制度；中国ODS文件不能替代EEAA ODS许可要求。
summary.zht: 中國同樣是《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方，依據中國HCFC淘汰管理計劃（HPMP）管理本國HCFC削減工作。GB 9237規定了製冷系統的製冷劑安全要求。中國熱泵製造商已基本完成向R-410A和R-32的過渡。中國國內ODS管制由生態環境部（MEE）主管，屬於獨立的國內制度；中國ODS文件不能替代EEAA ODS許可要求。

standards_or_laws: China HCFC Phase-out Management Plan (HPMP) — MEE administered
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps
China domestic ODS import/export licensing — MEE

gap.en: Chinese exporters shipping heat pump units pre-charged with R-22 face active import restrictions under EEAA's HCFC phasedown schedule and may be unable to obtain an ODS import permit. Units charged with R-410A or R-32 face no comparable ODS import barrier. Chinese ODS documentation and MEE permits are not recognised by EEAA. Exporters should confirm refrigerant type and current EEAA phasedown status with the Egyptian importer or EEAA before contracting shipment of HCFC-charged units.
gap.zh: 出口含R-22预充制冷剂热泵机组的中国出口商，面临EEAA HCFC削减计划下的积极进口限制，可能无法获得ODS进口许可证。充注R-410A或R-32的机组不面临类似ODS进口障碍。中国ODS文件和MEE许可证不被EEAA认可。出口商在签订HCFC充注机组装运合同前，应与埃及进口商或EEAA确认制冷剂类型及EEAA当前削减状态。
gap.zht: 出口含R-22預充製冷劑熱泵機組的中國出口商，面臨EEAA HCFC削減計劃下的積極進口限制，可能無法獲得ODS進口許可證。充注R-410A或R-32的機組不面臨類似ODS進口障礙。中國ODS文件和MEE許可證不被EEAA認可。出口商在簽訂HCFC充注機組裝運合同前，應與埃及進口商或EEAA確認製冷劑類型及EEAA當前削減狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EEAA ODS import permit required for HCFC-charged equipment; R-22 equipment faces active phasedown import restrictions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically under China HPMP; Chinese ODS permits not recognised by EEAA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] High-risk gap for R-22 units — EEAA HCFC phasedown actively restricts R-22 equipment imports; specify R-410A or R-32 charged units to avoid ODS import barriers. Chinese MEE ODS documentation does not substitute EEAA ODS permit requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-22机组面临高风险差距——EEAA HCFC削减计划积极限制R-22设备进口；应指定充注R-410A或R-32的机组以规避ODS进口障碍。中国MEE ODS文件不能替代EEAA ODS许可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-22機組面臨高風險差距——EEAA HCFC削減計劃積極限制R-22設備進口；應指定充注R-410A或R-32的機組以規避ODS進口障礙。中國MEE ODS文件不能替代EEAA ODS許可要求。
